data.Name: Drogon DG2 — Recovery factor uncertainty
data.Summary: Dynamic simulation shows wide RF range (28–37%) driven by sweep efficiency and fault compartmentalisation.
data.Description: Dynamic simulation (50 realisations, revised porosity) gives RF range 28–37%. P50 = 32.5%. Absolute recoverable reduced by ~20% vs DG1 (14.8 vs 18.5 MSm³). Main driver is sweep efficiency in NorthHorst and EastLobe where fault baffles may create unswept compartments. ICD completions and Phase 2 water injection are key mitigations.
